audit_items.proof_trace: `GPV2CompatibleAuction._onAuctionEnd` calls `super._onAuctionEnd(asset, hasFeeAggregator)` then unconditionally executes `IERC20(asset).forceApprove(i_gpV2VaultRelayer, 0)` as its final statement, setting the allowance to 0 on every successful execution. The only call site (`BaseAuction.performUpkeep` L366) is the sole code path that triggers auction end, so all paths are covered. If `_onAuctionEnd` reverts (e.g., feeAggregator rejects transfer), the entire transaction reverts and the post-condition is not violated.
